title: Maria's Selection Extendable Bamboo Bath Tray – Adjustable Over-the-Bath Caddy for Wine, Candles, Books & Tablet – Eco-Friendly Bath Tub Rack for Spa Nights & Self-Care | 50–92cm
features: EXTENDABLE BAMBOO BATH TRAY: Relax in style with this eco-friendly wooden bath rack. Extending from 50cm to 92cm, it fits most standard tubs and provides a stable surface for wine, candles, snacks, books, or a tablet.

LUXURY SPA EXPERIENCE AT HOME: Tub Tray brings peace and tranquility right into your home’s bath time experience. Relax and unwind after a long day & treat yourself to some well deserved me-time with our expandable bamboo bathtub tray.

SUSTAINABLE & WATER-RESISTANT BAMBOO: Crafted from strong, smooth-finish bamboo that’s naturally water-resistant and sustainably sourced, this wooden bath shelf has a clean look that complements rustic, boho, and modern bathrooms.
SPECIFICATION: Extendable Bamboo Bath Tray | Dimensions: 50–92cm (L) x 18cm (W) x 4cm (H) | Material: Eco-Friendly Bamboo | Wipe Clean | No Assembly Required

TRANSFORM YOUR BATHTIME ROUTINE– Elevate your relaxation with this elegant bamboo bath tray. Our bath rack is a perfect bathroom accessory designed to fit perfectly across your bathtub. A versatile wooden bath tray that brings spa-like luxury to your home.
description: Transform your bathing experience into a luxurious retreat with our exquisite bamboo bath tray, designed to elevate your relaxation time. Crafted from sustainable bamboo, this elegant tray not only adds a touch of natural beauty to your bathroom but also offers exceptional durability and water resistance. Featuring a spacious surface, it comfortably accommodates your favorite items, from a glass of wine and scented candles to a book or tablet, ensuring everything you need is within arm's reach. The adjustable design allows it to fit most bathtubs, providing a secure and stable platform for your essentials. With its sleek lines and warm finish, this bamboo bath tray is not just a functional accessory; it’s a statement piece that enhances your self-care routine, making every bath a serene escape. Indulge in the ultimate relaxation experience and make this bath tray a staple in your home sanctuary.
